items.title: Supreme Court ponders deporting green card holders
items.description: The Trump administration asked the Supreme Court on Wednesday to make it easier to deport green card holders with criminal records who leave the count...

items.title: Appeals court blocks California's No Vigilantes law forcing ICE to display names while on duty
items.description: A federal appeals court ruled against California Gov. Gavin Newsom on Wednesday, putting on hold his state law that tried to force federal immigration...

items.title: Rep. David Scott dies suddenly just weeks before primary election in bid for 13th term
items.description: Rep. David Scott has died after representing his Georgia district for more than two decades. He was 80 years old.

items.title: Trump announces Iranian female protesters won't be executed
items.description: President Trump announced on social media Wednesday that the eight Iranian women scheduled to be executed by the regime now won't be.

items.title: Got drumsticks? Bill would allow SNAP participants to buy hot rotisserie chicken
items.description: The Hot Rotisserie Chicken Act aims to kill two birds with one stone: affordability and nutrition.
